release_notes:
Alpha 5.1.0 - 2026-05-18 - Major release: multi-format pipeline + NEW Reconciliation module  + NEW CN8 self-healing module.

Major release rolling up 24 incremental versions (5.0.107 →
5.0.130). Headlines: multi-format end-to-end on Enhance +
CN8, full Reconciliation overhaul (worker thread, masterdata
picker, presets, history, pivots up front), CN8 Apply
auto-detects + self-heals via an exhaustive-cell-scan
fallback, Auto-Filler country override, Masterdata health
suggests Trs values, Delta Patcher shows real patch notes +
self-heals dependencies via Verify & Fix, options + scope
screens redesigned for usability, dialogs are cancel-safe.
